# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We are committed to providing a welcoming and respectful environment for everyone.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive
- Provide actionable feedback
- Assume positive intent
- Focus on improving the project

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Discrimination
- Personal attacks
- Doxxing
- Aggressive or hostile conduct

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove comments, close issues, or block users who violate this code.

---

This project follows a professional collaboration standard.
